verdict.rationale: The Q4 2025 finance pack explicitly states gross margin equals 63.0% and the underlying inputs (Revenue EUR 4.2800m, Cost of revenue EUR 1.5836m) produce (4.2800-1.5836)/4.2800 = 0.6300, exactly matching the claim.

evidence.span_text: Gross margin is calculated as (Revenue - Cost of revenue) / Revenue. Using Q4 actuals: (EUR 4.2800m - EUR 1.5836m) / EUR 4.2800m = 63.0%.
Revenue 4.2800; Cost of revenue (1.5836); Gross profit 2.6964
